org.createSubtitle: Organizations group repositories and members under a shared namespace.
org.name: Name
org.nameHint: Letters, digits, `_`, `.`, `-`. Must be unique across users and orgs.

settings.subtitle: Manage organization metadata and members.
settings.generalHint: Update display info for this organization.
settings.deleteHint: All repositories owned by this org become unreachable.
settings.deleteDescription: Confirm by typing the org name. Repositories owned by the org are soft-archived and stop appearing under /{name}.
settings.deleteMismatch: Confirmation must match the org name

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who belongs to this organization and their role.
members.addDescription: Add an existing Hangrix user to this organization.

register.title: Create account
register.description: The first account becomes the administrator.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account info and credentials.
profile.emailDescription: Change the address associated with this account.
profile.passwordDescription: Changing your password requires the current one.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage every account on the platform.
users.cardDescription: Manage account roles and status. Operations on your own account are restricted.

llm.title: LLM providers
llm.subtitle: Configure upstream LLM endpoints and the per-provider model whitelists agents can route through.
llm.cardDescription: Requests are routed to providers by model name. API keys are stored encrypted.
llm.createSubtitle: The name cannot be changed after creation. Delete and re-create if you need to rename.
llm.editSubtitle: Update base URL, rotate the API key, or change the allowed-models whitelist.
llm.deleteConfirm: Delete provider "{name}"? Sessions that depend on it will stop working.
llm.emptyHint: Without at least one provider, no agent can call an LLM.
llm.disableConfirm: Disable provider "{name}"? Models served only by this provider will become unavailable.

fields.name: Name
fields.nameHint: Lower-case letters, digits, and hyphens. Used to identify this provider in the admin interface.
fields.apiKeyHint: Encrypted at rest; readable only by the platform.
fields.apiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current key. Type a new key to rotate.

modelGroups.label: Model groups
modelGroups.listDescription: Group similar models so agents use a group name and the system picks the first available model.
modelGroups.createSubtitle: Combine models from any provider into a named group. Agents use the group name as if it were a model.
modelGroups.editSubtitle: Reorder, add, or remove models from this group.
modelGroups.deleteConfirm: Delete group "{name}"? Agents configured to use this group will lose their model routing.
modelGroups.emptyHint: Create a group to bundle similar models together for automatic failover.
modelGroups.detailSubtitle: View model availability and manually enable or disable entries.

fields.name: Group name
fields.nameHint: Lower-case letters, digits, and hyphens. This name is used in agents.yml as the model value.
fields.entriesHint: Add models and set their priority order.

status.allDisabled: All models in this group are currently disabled

actions.disableConfirm: Manually disable "{model}"? It will be excluded from routing until re-enabled.

llmModels.title: LLM Models
llmModels.subtitle: Define model specs (context window, vision) and link them to provider groups.
llmModels.createSubtitle: Create a model definition with its spec and provider bindings.
llmModels.editSubtitle: Update model specifications, effort map, or provider members.
llmModels.deleteConfirm: Delete model "{name}"? Its associated group and members will also be removed.
llmModels.emptyHint: Define model specs here so agents can discover context windows and vision capabilities.
llmModels.membersHint: Each member binds an upstream model to a provider entry.

fields.name: Name
fields.nameHint: Lower-case letters, digits, dots, underscores, hyphens. Used in agents.yml model references.
fields.displayNameHint: Optional friendly name shown in the UI.

runners.title: Runners
runners.subtitle: Manage the container hosts that execute agent sessions.
runners.cardDescription: Runners enroll with a one-time token and stay active via periodic heartbeats.
runners.createSubtitle: Create a runner available to the entire platform.
runners.disableConfirm: Disable runner "{name}"? Any sessions it owns will fail their next heartbeat.
runners.emptyHint: Without a runner, agent sessions cannot start.
runners.removeConfirm: Permanently remove runner "{name}"? Historical sessions stay but lose their runner pointer. This cannot be undone.
runners.enrollWarning: Copy this token now — it's the only time it will be shown in plain text. After enrollment the runner stores its long-lived agent token derived from this exchange.
runners.installHint: Run this on the host where you want hangrix-runner installed. Requires root or write access to /usr/local/bin.
runners.manualHint: If you've already installed hangrix-runner (e.g. via package manager or built from source), run this command directly.

usage.title: LLM usage
usage.subtitle: Per-call records of every agent session's LLM traffic — tokens, latency, error rate.
usage.cardDescription: Filter by provider or time range. Click a session link to jump to its issue.

agentSessions.title: Agent sessions
agentSessions.subtitle: Global, cross-issue view of every agent session on the platform.
agentSessions.cardDescription: Filter by role, status, repo, or time range. To inspect logs, open the issue and use the Agents tab.
agentSessions.empty: No sessions match the current filters
agentSessions.openHint: Open an issue's Agents tab to inspect per-session message logs.

lifecycle.title: Container lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: Configure when idle containers are stopped and when archived sessions have their containers removed.
lifecycle.idleStopHint: Go duration (e.g. 1h, 30m) of inactivity before the container is automatically stopped.
lifecycle.archiveRemoveHint: Go duration (e.g. 168h = 7d) after a session is archived before its container is permanently removed.
lifecycle.periodicCheckHint: Go duration (e.g. 720h = 30d) after a session is abandoned before its container is cleaned up.
lifecycle.asyncHint: Settings take effect on the next periodic scan — containers already running are not affected retroactively.

actions.removeConfirm: Remove the container for session #{id}? This cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: At-a-glance platform metrics: calls, tokens, sessions, and runner health.
dashboard.empty: No data for the selected range
dashboard.emptyHint: Try a different time range or provider filter.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: An overview of your workspace.
home.m1Description: Hangrix provides account management, repository hosting, and AI agent collaboration.

project.title: Projects
project.subtitle: Multi-repo coordination spaces
project.emptyHint: Create a project for xrobot-style multi-repository work.
project.createSubtitle: Create a project space that can coordinate multiple repositories.
project.cardDescription: Use this for xrobot-style top-level planning.
project.name: Name
project.visibilityPrivateHint: Only owners and members can read it.

repo.title: Repositories
repo.subtitle: Repositories you own or collaborate on.
repo.emptyHint: In Hangrix, every git collaboration starts with a repository.
repo.createSubtitle: Create a repository and start cloning right away.
repo.ownerHint: Pick your account or an organization you belong to.
repo.name: Repository name
repo.visibilityPrivateHint: Only you and admins can see it
repo.initReadmeHint: Creates an initial commit with a README.md. You can later use your code agent to set up Hangrix configuration.

agentInit.title: Initialize this repo with your code agent
agentInit.hint: Paste the prompt below to your agent. It will read the reference .txt first, then generate Hangrix config and initial code tailored to your project.
agentInit.refLink: Reference (.txt, readable by agents via webfetch)

repo.notFound: Repository not found or access denied

files.emptyRepo: This repository has no commits yet
files.emptyRepoHint: Get started by pushing your first commit. The HTTPS clone URL is shown above.
files.createFromScratch: Create a new repository on the command line
files.pushExisting: …or push an existing repository from the command line
files.tooLarge: File is too large to preview online (> 1 MiB)
files.name: Name

edit.title: Edit file
edit.createNewBranch: Create a new branch for this commit
edit.noPermission: You don't have permission to edit this file.
edit.tooLarge: File is too large to edit online (> 1 MiB).
edit.binary: Binary files cannot be edited online.
edit.conflict: This branch has been updated since you started editing.
edit.conflictHint: Please refresh the page and try again.

settings.title: Repository settings
settings.deleteHint: Deleting permanently removes all repository data. This cannot be undone.
settings.transferHint: Move this repository to a different user or organization.
settings.transferDescription: All repository data and access URLs are moved to the new owner.

branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Manage all branches of this repository.
branches.name: Branch name

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Pin an immutable reference to a commit.
tags.name: Tag name
tags.annotatedHint: Writes a tag object (author + message). Use this for releases.

compare.title: Compare
compare.subtitle: Pick two refs to see what changed.

protections.title: Branch protection
protections.subtitle: Rules apply to branches whose name matches the pattern (glob: `*` matches a segment, `?` matches a single char).
protections.empty: No protection rules yet. Default branch still has implicit protection.
protections.hint: Force-push and delete protections are enforced on git push and in the web UI.

containsRefs.title: In refs
containsRefs.none: Not yet reachable from any branch or tag.

silence.bannerSilenced: This repository is in silence mode — agent actions are paused.
silence.currentStateHint: View and manage the current silence status for this repository.
silence.enterManualHint: Manually silence this repository. All running agent sessions will be suspended.
silence.enterWarning: Agents currently running will be suspended at their next tool call. They will automatically resume when silence ends.
silence.exitConfirm: Exit silence mode? Paused agents will automatically resume.
silence.overridesHint: Sessions with an override are exempt from silence — they can continue working.
silence.grantOverrideHint: Exempt a specific session from the silence block.
silence.auditLogHint: Recent silence state changes and override events.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this repository and their role.
members.addDescription: Add an existing Hangrix user to this repository.

automation.tasksSubtitle: Configure periodic tasks that auto-create issues and wake agent roles.
automation.taskFormSubtitle: Define a cron-driven task that creates an issue on schedule.
automation.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Create one to automate periodic work.
automation.deleteConfirm: Delete task "{name}"? This removes it from .hangrix/automation.yml.
automation.nameInvalid: Name must be lowercase letters, digits and hyphens, starting with a letter.
automation.rolesRequired: At least one role is required.
automation.nameDuplicate: A task with this name already exists.
automation.fieldScheduleHint: Standard 5-field UTC cron: min hour dom month dow. E.g. "0 8 * * 1".
automation.fieldIssueBodyPlaceholder: Describe what the agent should do…
automation.fieldRolesHint: Comma-separated agent role keys. E.g. "implementer, reviewer".
automation.runsSubtitle: Last 10 execution records for this repository.

variables.variablesSubtitle: Values stored in plain text. Visible to repository administrators.
variables.secretsSubtitle: Encrypted at rest. Once saved, the value cannot be retrieved — you can only overwrite it.
variables.createDescription: Variables and secrets are available to agent workflows running on this repository.
variables.editDescription: Update the value. For secrets, leave the value blank to keep the current one.
variables.secretEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current secret unchanged.
variables.hint: To use a variable in your agent configuration, reference it as ${NAME} in environment values (whole-value replacement only).

import.title: Batch import from .env
import.description: Paste the contents of a .env file to import variables or secrets in bulk. Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
import.textareaPlaceholder:
PASTE=.env content here...
# Comments and blank lines are ignored
ANOTHER_KEY=value

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Automate builds, tests, and deployments with CI/CD workflows.
workflows.emptyHint: Push to a branch with matching workflow triggers or use the dispatch button.

runDetail.selectJob: Select a job from the list to view its logs.

workflows.loadFailed: Run not found or access denied
workflows.dispatchSubtitle: Choose a workflow to run manually.
workflows.dispatchRefHint: Branch or tag to run the workflow against. Uses the default branch if empty.
workflows.cancelConfirm: Cancel this workflow run? Running jobs will be terminated.

error.nodeMissing: Node.js runtime not found in container

issue.title: Issues
issue.subtitle: Everything starts with an issue — a conversation, a branch, and an agent session.
issue.newSubtitle: An issue bundles your request, its branch, and the conversation around it.
issue.branchAutoNote: Each issue gets its own working branch automatically — you don't need to pick one.

fields.title: Title
fields.bodyHint: Markdown is fine — agents and humans both read this.

issue.emptyHint: Open the first one to start a conversation around your repo.
issue.pushHint: Check out the branch and push to add commits:
issue.commitsEmpty: No commits yet. Push to {branch} to introduce changes.

commentForm.title: Add a comment
commentForm.hostYamlError: .hangrix/agents.yml is invalid — {'@'}-mentions won't autocomplete and triggers (issue.opened / issue.comment / commit.pushed) won't wake any agent until this is fixed

issue.closedFinal: This issue is closed and cannot be reopened.
issue.diffEmpty: Nothing to diff — push commits to {branch} to see changes.
issue.subIssueBlock: {n} open sub-issue(s) must be merged or closed first:

empty.title: No sub-issues yet
empty.hint: Mention {'@'}agent-planner to break down the goal.

error.banner: Failed to load plan — showing last snapshot

plan.heuristicTip: Dependency edges provide precise calculation when available.
plan.treeLarge: Large tree — consider hiding completed items.

review.title: Reviews
review.staleWarning: {n} previous review(s) are stale — a new commit was pushed after they were submitted.

blockReason.review_required: The latest commit needs a fresh review before merging.

contributions.title: Contributions
contributions.emptyHint: Contribution branches agents push to this issue will appear here. Each can be reviewed and merged independently.
contributions.confirmApply: Apply contribution "{title}" into the issue branch?
contributions.checksEmpty: No CI checks for this issue yet.
contributions.checksEmptyContribution: No CI checks for this contribution yet.

questionnaire.title: Questionnaire
questionnaire.submitted: Submitted — you cannot modify your answers.
questionnaire.closedNoResults: This questionnaire is closed. Results are not yet available.
questionnaire.loginToSubmit: Sign in to submit your answers.
questionnaire.locked: This questionnaire has already been answered and is no longer accepting responses.

skill.empty: No skills available in this repository
skill.bodyOverride: Description will be filled by the skill template

errors.notFound: Skill "/{slug}" not found. Check the spelling or pick from the list.
errors.invalid: Skill template file is malformed. Contact the repository administrator.
errors.titleMismatch: Title must start with "/{slug}" when a skill is selected.

release.title: Releases
release.subtitle: Package and publish tagged versions of this repository.
release.newSubtitle: Create a release from an existing tag.
release.loadFailed: Release not found or access denied
release.emptyHint: Create a release to package a tagged version.
release.publishConfirm: Publish this release? It will become publicly visible (for public repos).
release.deleteConfirm: Delete release "{title}"? This also removes all uploaded assets.

fields.tagHint: Pick an existing tag for this release.
fields.title: Title
fields.titleHint: Optional. Defaults to the tag name.
fields.notesAutofilled: Auto-filled from the tag's annotation message.

pat.title: Personal Access Tokens
pat.subtitle: Used for git push and API access. The token is shown exactly once at creation — store it safely.
pat.name: Name
pat.plaintextWarning: This is the only time you'll see the full token. Once you close this dialog it cannot be retrieved — you'll have to create a new one.
pat.revokeConfirm: Revoke token "{name}"? Clients using it will immediately lose push / pull access.
pat.emptyHint: You need at least one repo:write token to git push.

validation.invalidEnum: Value is not in the allowed set

agentSessions.emptyHint: Configure roles in .hangrix/agents.yml and they will appear here once they run.
agentSessions.messagesEmpty: This session hasn't emitted any output yet.
agentSessions.failureNoDetail: No error detail captured. Check the message log below for the agent's last frames.

actions.stopConfirm: Stop this agent? The running container will be asked to shut down and the session will be marked failed.
actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? Its message log will be removed and cannot be recovered.
actions.resetConfirm: Reset will archive the current session and start a fresh one. Continue?
actions.resetRunningConfirm: The agent is still running. Reset will terminate this session and clear all history. Continue?
